words.def: a discharge of lightning accompanied by thunder
words.zh: n. 門閂, 螺釘, 篩子, 閃電, 意外事件

words.def: botfly larva; typically develops inside the body of a horse or sheep or human
words.zh: [計] 磁帶開始標誌, 計算機角色

words.def: (often followed by `of') a large number or amount or extent
words.zh: n. 運氣, 籤, 抽籤, 份額, 許多, 一堆
